response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), aligning well with the role's requirements. His recent work on MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq directly matches the GenAI focus. However, his resume lacks explicit mentions of vector databases, RAG architectures, or cloud platform expertise, which are critical for this role. His leadership in open-source projects and mentorship further strengthens his candidacy.
strengths: 8+ years of full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience with TypeScript and Node.js
Proven track record of leading technical projects and mentoring teams (e.g., GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Recent work on MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq, demonstrating alignment with GenAI requirements
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases or RAG architectures in resume
Limited detail on cloud platform expertise (AWS, GCP, Azure) in recent roles
No PhD or Master's degree, though Bachelor's degree meets the minimum requirement
